T2_spectra¶

 1n := 8;
 2FF<g> := GF(2^n);
 3P<x> := PolynomialRing(FF);
 4
 5T2 := [
 6g^130*x^192 + g^160*x^160 + g^117*x^144 + g^230*x^136 + g^228*x^132 + g^162*x^130 + g^25*x^129 + g^79*x^96 + g^204*x^80 + g^83*x^72 + g^159*x^68 + g^234*x^66 + g^36*x^65 + g^67*x^48 + g^151*x^40 + g^17*x^36 + g^81*x^34 + g^52*x^33 + g^9*x^24 + g^116*x^20 + g^102*x^18 + g^97*x^17 + g^74*x^12 + g^48*x^10 + g^144*x^9 + g^58*x^6 + g^146*x^5 + g^123*x^3,
 7g^154*x^192 + g^36*x^160 + g^83*x^144 + g^160*x^136 + g^253*x^132 + g^215*x^130 + g^221*x^129 + g^76*x^96 + g^137*x^80 + g^206*x^72 + g^185*x^68 + g^165*x^66 + g^201*x^65 + g^226*x^48 + g^25*x^40 + g^65*x^36 + g^11*x^33 + g^170*x^24 + g^247*x^20 + g^155*x^18 + g*x^17 + g^146*x^12 + g^204*x^10 + g^121*x^9 + g^202*x^6 + g^246*x^5 + g^170*x^3,
 8g^183*x^192 + g^178*x^160 + g^103*x^144 + g^97*x^136 + g^37*x^132 + g^172*x^130 + g^102*x^129 + g^62*x^96 + g^145*x^80 + g^96*x^72 + g^132*x^68 + g^210*x^66 + g^69*x^65 + g^69*x^48 + g^11*x^40 + x^36 + g^4*x^34 + g^76*x^33 + g^122*x^24 + g^6*x^20 + g^145*x^18 + g^155*x^17 + g^41*x^12 + g^40*x^10 + g^106*x^9 + g^144*x^6 + g^102*x^5 + g^246*x^3,
 9g^22*x^192 + g^167*x^160 + g^178*x^144 + g^84*x^136 + g^219*x^132 + g^248*x^130 + g^130*x^129 + g^221*x^96 + g^84*x^80 + g^123*x^72 + g^140*x^68 + g^26*x^66 + g^108*x^65 + g^50*x^48 + g^15*x^40 + g^211*x^36 + g^116*x^34 + g^19*x^33 + g^228*x^24 + g^176*x^20 + g^42*x^18 + g^80*x^17 + g^180*x^12 + g^203*x^10 + g^104*x^9 + g^72*x^6 + g^151*x^5 + g^247*x^3,
10g^156*x^192 + g^25*x^160 + g^158*x^144 + g^20*x^136 + g^50*x^132 + g^140*x^130 + g^203*x^129 + g^184*x^96 + g^152*x^80 + g^228*x^72 + g^194*x^68 + g^203*x^66 + g^131*x^65 + g^25*x^48 + g^192*x^40 + g^191*x^36 + g^125*x^34 + g^136*x^33 + g^132*x^24 + g^85*x^20 + g^191*x^18 + g^120*x^17 + g^212*x^12 + g^244*x^10 + g^133*x^9 + g^78*x^6 + g^161*x^5 + g*x^3,
11g^193*x^192 + g^33*x^160 + g^22*x^144 + g^204*x^136 + g^173*x^132 + g^50*x^130 + g^66*x^129 + g^42*x^96 + g^69*x^80 + g^175*x^72 + g^230*x^68 + g^253*x^66 + g^16*x^65 + g^52*x^48 + g^54*x^40 + g^9*x^36 + g^177*x^34 + g^99*x^33 + g^12*x^24 + g^37*x^20 + g^83*x^18 + g^230*x^17 + g^78*x^12 + g*x^10 + g^64*x^9 + g^225*x^6 + g^68*x^5 + g^204*x^3,
12g^88*x^192 + g^8*x^160 + g^11*x^144 + g^121*x^136 + g^205*x^132 + g^165*x^130 + g^206*x^129 + g^164*x^96 + g^235*x^80 + g^94*x^72 + g^173*x^68 + g^142*x^66 + g^238*x^65 + g^102*x^48 + g^113*x^40 + g^183*x^36 + g^187*x^34 + g^157*x^33 + g^2*x^24 + g^23*x^20 + g^122*x^18 + g^21*x^17 + g^154*x^12 + g^78*x^10 + g^117*x^9 + g^177*x^6 + g^111*x^5 + g^60*x^3,
13g^212*x^192 + g^198*x^160 + g^175*x^144 + g^80*x^136 + g^196*x^132 + g^167*x^130 + g^2*x^129 + g^65*x^96 + g^243*x^80 + g^91*x^72 + g^171*x^68 + g^211*x^66 + g^182*x^65 + g^247*x^48 + g^86*x^40 + g^89*x^36 + g^87*x^34 + g^83*x^33 + g^138*x^24 + g^45*x^20 + g^149*x^18 + g^100*x^17 + g^188*x^12 + g^17*x^10 + g^243*x^9 + g^237*x^6 + g^112*x^5 + g^137*x^3,
14g^117*x^192 + g^61*x^160 + g^230*x^144 + g^105*x^136 + g^191*x^132 + g^113*x^130 + g^245*x^129 + g^139*x^96 + g^166*x^80 + g^210*x^72 + g^221*x^68 + g^138*x^66 + g^146*x^65 + g^120*x^48 + g^124*x^40 + g^252*x^36 + g^182*x^34 + g^5*x^33 + g^8*x^24 + g^136*x^20 + g^235*x^18 + g^61*x^17 + g^45*x^12 + g^149*x^10 + g^158*x^9 + g^13*x^6 + g^169*x^5 + g^121*x^3,
15g^34*x^192 + g^57*x^160 + g^187*x^144 + g^36*x^136 + g^137*x^132 + g^63*x^130 + g^98*x^129 + g^236*x^96 + g^161*x^80 + g^66*x^72 + g^191*x^68 + g^117*x^66 + g^241*x^65 + g^7*x^48 + g^9*x^40 + g^153*x^36 + g^118*x^34 + g^154*x^33 + g^194*x^24 + g^157*x^20 + g^14*x^18 + g^116*x^17 + g^119*x^12 + g^113*x^10 + g^13*x^9 + g^138*x^6 + g^143*x^5 + g^35*x^3,
16g^140*x^192 + g^233*x^160 + g^150*x^144 + g^146*x^136 + g^99*x^132 + g^249*x^130 + g^211*x^129 + g^66*x^96 + g^37*x^80 + g^35*x^72 + g^199*x^68 + g^170*x^66 + g^2*x^65 + g^217*x^48 + g^2*x^40 + g^192*x^36 + g^32*x^34 + g^229*x^33 + g^241*x^24 + g^200*x^20 + g^63*x^18 + g^17*x^17 + g^251*x^12 + g^44*x^10 + g^106*x^9 + g^25*x^6 + g^174*x^5 + g^127*x^3,
17g^237*x^192 + g^133*x^160 + g^204*x^144 + g^169*x^136 + g^30*x^132 + g^127*x^130 + g^41*x^129 + g^12*x^96 + g^198*x^80 + g^151*x^72 + g^252*x^68 + g^29*x^66 + g^144*x^65 + g^120*x^48 + g^72*x^40 + g^123*x^36 + g^170*x^34 + g^159*x^33 + g^77*x^24 + g^227*x^20 + g^161*x^18 + g^231*x^17 + g^159*x^12 + g^253*x^10 + g^56*x^9 + g^35*x^6 + g^251*x^5 + g^99*x^3
18];
